subject: session date
fact: The session date is April 12th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Apr 12th, 2026

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas noticed that their imp guide had vanished entirely.
source_quote: Akritas noticed with a quiet unease that their imp guide had vanished entirely

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur stepped forward to examine the lift's locking mechanism.
source_quote: Felkur stepped forward to examine the lift's locking mechanism

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mocked the ancient and notoriously unreliable Abyssal operating system powering the device.
source_quote: mocked the ancient and notoriously unreliable Abyssal operating system powering the device

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur bypassed the lift's locking mechanism so cleanly that no one below would notice it had been touched at all.
source_quote: bypassing it so cleanly that no one below would notice it had been touched at all

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur crouched low and began carefully probing the tiles with his tools.
source_quote: Felkur crouched low and began carefully probing the tiles, his tools dancing across the stone

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur recoiled when he discovered the second tile was rigged with a devastating magical glyph.
source_quote: when he suddenly recoiled — the second tile was rigged with a devastating magical glyph

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur deduced that the stone golem was keyed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen.
source_quote: Felkur studied the creature carefully and deduced that it was keyed to recognize the specific scent of Vraxen himself

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur produced a device he had originally built to extract unpleasant flavors from his food.
source_quote: produced a device he had originally built to extract unpleasant flavors from his food

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur turned the device to extracting Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear.
source_quote: He turned it instead to extracting Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur's practiced hands made short work of the vault door's locks.
source_quote: Felkur's practiced hands made short work of its locks

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur opened the Lexicon of Oaths and searched for his own name.
source_quote: Felkur opened the Lexicon and searched for his own name

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur found Transaction 44781 recorded the sale of a priceless brooch by one Felkur Oldenwood.
source_quote: Transaction 44781, dated to a winter night long past, recorded the sale of a priceless brooch belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra — sold by one Felkur Oldenwood

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was noted to have a blood alcohol content of 0.18% during the sale.
source_quote: blood alcohol content noted at a remarkable 0.18%

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur sold the brooch for the sum of forty-five gold pieces.
source_quote: for the sum of forty-five gold pieces

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur unknowingly became the Phantom Thief because the brooch's ward made its bearer impervious to magical location.
source_quote: Felkur had unknowingly become the Phantom Thief — a figure so mysterious that his theft had sparked paranoid conspiracy theories

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur found a loophole in the contract with Maram il Vass stating that if the Lexicon no longer contained his information, the contract was null and void.
source_quote: he found a loophole — if the Lexicon no longer contained the information needed to identify him, the contract was null and void

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur set to work altering the entry, carefully replacing his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: Felkur set to work altering the entry, carefully replacing his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur forged a new entry attributing the original theft to the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: and then forged a new entry attributing the original theft to the Phantom Thief

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur added a new entry crediting the Phantom Thief with stealing the record itself.
source_quote: He also added a new entry crediting the Phantom Thief with stealing the record itself

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur slid a large pure crystal known as the Faerzess Shard into his pack.
source_quote: Felkur, apparently having learned nothing from the evening's events, also slid a large pure crystal — Faerzess Shard, a powerful enhancer of artificer abilities — quietly into his pack

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur set to work recalibrating the teleportation circle using his tools and the arcane crystals the party had collected.
source_quote: Felkur immediately set to work recalibrating the circle using his tools and the arcane crystals the party had collected

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration.
source_quote: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur deployed his eldritch cannon, which swiveled and fired a crackling blast into the stone golem's flank.
source_quote: Felkur, invisible behind his pillar, deployed his eldritch cannon, which swiveled and fired a crackling blast into the stone golem's flank

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur worked in silence and shadow with invisible hands threading arcane crystals through the teleportation circle's mechanisms.
source_quote: Felkur worked in silence and shadow, his invisible hands threading arcane crystals through the teleportation circle's mechanisms with painstaking care

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon a powerful enchantment that stripped away all illusions and concealments.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a powerful enchantment that stripped away all illusions and concealments

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim confirmed through his enchanted sight that the vault room held no further traps.
source_quote: Bramgrim confirmed through his enchanted sight that the room held no further traps

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim spotted a hidden door concealed within the vault's walls.
source_quote: Bramgrim spotted a hidden door concealed within the vault's walls

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim cast a protective enchantment over Felkur to shield him from direct assault.
source_quote: Bramgrim cast a protective enchantment over Felkur to shield him from direct assault

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon spectral guardians that swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon spectral guardians that swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits

subject: Daein
fact: Daein positioned himself to provide support.
source_quote: Daein positioned himself to provide support

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used the magical mandolin to render Felkur invisible.
source_quote: Daein used the magical mandolin to render Felkur invisible

subject: Daein
fact: Daein attempted to shove the golem back through the ruined doorway.
source_quote: Daein attempted to shove the golem back through the ruined doorway

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas readied her bow toward the iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Akritas readied her bow toward the iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas marked the golem as her quarry and loosed a well-aimed shot that struck true.
source_quote: Akritas marked the golem as her quarry and loosed a well-aimed shot that struck true

subject: Veris
fact: Veris stormed into the chamber with his face twisted with fury.
source_quote: Veris stormed into the chamber, his face twisted with fury

subject: Veris
fact: Veris snarled that he would not be killed by the likes of the party.
source_quote: I will not be killed by the likes of you!

subject: Veris
fact: Veris teleported across the chamber to reposition himself.
source_quote: Veris, unwilling to be caught in the swirling chaos of the spirit guardians, teleported across the chamber to reposition himself

subject: Veris
fact: Veris circled the chamber with cold fury.
source_quote: Veris circled the chamber with cold fury

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the entire party.
source_quote: Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the entire party

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric was a fence who bought the brooch from Felkur.
source_quote: for the sum of forty-five gold pieces to a fence named Limping Oric

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen's personal journal detailed his secret plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: Vraxen's personal journal, which detailed the Arcanoloth's secret plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen's scent was extracted from the Owlbear by Felkur.
source_quote: extracting Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd was involved in a three-way confrontation in the dining hall below.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had engineered between Vraxen the Arcanoloth, the fire giant Veperyd, and High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Phantom Thief
fact: The Phantom Thief is a figure so mysterious that his theft sparked paranoid conspiracy theories and multiple executions of high investigators.
source_quote: a figure so mysterious that his theft had sparked paranoid conspiracy theories, multiple executions of high investigators, and years of fruitless searching across Maerimydra

subject: Yugoloth
fact: Vraxen planned to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: secret plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: dining hall confrontation
fact: Chaos erupted in the dining hall below as the party slipped away from a three-way confrontation.
source_quote: With chaos erupting in the dining hall below, the party slipped away from the three-way confrontation

subject: imp guide disappearance
fact: The party's imp guide vanished entirely.
source_quote: their imp guide had vanished entirely

subject: lift bypass
fact: Felkur bypassed the lift's locking mechanism.
source_quote: bypassing it so cleanly that no one below would notice it had been touched at all

subject: glyph discovery
fact: A devastating magical glyph was rigged to the second tile of the corridor.
source_quote: the second tile was rigged with a devastating magical glyph that would have detonated in his face had he touched it

subject: trap pattern reveal
fact: Bramgrim's True Seeing revealed that the traps were laid upon tiles corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: the traps were laid upon tiles corresponding to prime numbers

subject: corridor crossing
fact: The party crossed the corridor unharmed by stepping around the dangerous tiles.
source_quote: Stepping carefully around the dangerous tiles, the party crossed the corridor unharmed

subject: golem bypass
fact: The stone golem stepped silently aside after sensing Vraxen's scent on the Owlbear.
source_quote: The golem's blank eyes registered the familiar scent, and it stepped silently aside

subject: vault entry
fact: The party stepped inside the vault after Felkur made short work of the locks.
source_quote: the party stepped inside

subject: Lexicon discovery
fact: The party discovered the Lexicon of Oaths resting beneath a crystal dome on a stone pedestal.
source_quote: At the center of the room, resting beneath a crystal dome on a stone pedestal, was the Lexicon of Oaths

subject: Felkur's past revealed
fact: Felkur discovered he had drunkenly sold a priceless brooch for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: Transaction 44781, dated to a winter night long past, recorded the sale of a priceless brooch belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra — sold by one Felkur Oldenwood, intoxicated, blood alcohol content noted at a remarkable 0.18%, for the sum of forty-five gold pieces

subject: contract loophole found
fact: Felkur found a loophole in his contract with Maram il Vass allowing him to void the obligation by erasing his information.
source_quote: he found a loophole — if the Lexicon no longer contained the information needed to identify him, the contract was null and void

fact: Felkur replaced his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris in the Lexicon.
source_quote: carefully replacing his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris

fact: Felkur forged a new entry attributing the theft to the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: forged a new entry attributing the original theft to the Phantom Thief

fact: The sound of the elevator beginning to move broke the moment of quiet looting.

fact: The adventurers slipped through the secret passage and climbed upward toward the peak of the spire.
source_quote: the adventurers slipped through it, climbing upward through the secret passage toward the very peak of the spire

fact: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration of the teleportation circle.
source_quote: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration

fact: Felkur's eldritch cannon fired a crackling blast into the stone golem's flank.

subject: vault
fact: The vault chamber was cool and precisely maintained, with walls lined with shelves bearing soul coins, infernal ledgers, and contracts.
source_quote: The chamber was cool and precisely maintained, its walls lined with shelves bearing soul coins, infernal ledgers, and contracts written in the language of devils

fact: The vault was kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.

fact: The party climbed upward through the secret passage toward the very peak of the spire.
source_quote: climbing upward through the secret passage toward the very peak of the spire

source_quote: used to grant access to the spire's lift and ultimately the vault

subject: Thieves' Tools
fact: Felkur used Thieves' Tools to bypass the lift mechanism and unlock the vault door.
source_quote: A set of specialized tools used by Felkur to bypass the lift mechanism and unlock the vault door

subject: no trace tampering
fact: Felkur's use of Thieves' Tools left no trace of tampering.
source_quote: with exceptional skill that left no trace of tampering

subject: Scent Extractor
fact: The Scent Extractor is a specialized mechanism among Felkur's gadgets originally designed to extract flavors.
source_quote: A specialized mechanism among Felkur's gadgets, originally designed to extract flavors to avoid spicy food

subject: scent extraction
fact: The Scent Extractor was repurposed to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear's fur.
source_quote: Repurposed to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear's fur to fool the stone golem guardian

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made from processed souls glowing with inner light.
source_quote: A massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made from processed souls glowing with inner light

subject: Lexicon updates
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically updates with all infernal contracts.
source_quote: It automatically updates with all infernal contracts

subject: Lexicon alteration
fact: Felkur altered the Lexicon of Oaths entries to replace his name with Veris's.
source_quote: Felkur altered its entries to replace his name with Veris's

subject: Phantom Thief entry
fact: Felkur added a new entry to the Lexicon of Oaths attributing the theft to the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: and add a new entry attributing the theft to the Phantom Thief

subject: Priceless Brooch
fact: The Priceless Brooch is a powerful artifact belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A powerful artifact belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra

subject: brooch theft
fact: Felkur stole the Priceless Brooch while drunk.
source_quote: Felkur stole it while drunk

subject: brooch sale price
fact: Felkur sold the Priceless Brooch to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: and sold it to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces

subject: brooch location magic
fact: The Priceless Brooch possesses a special ability that makes the bearer impervious to being located.
source_quote: It possesses a special ability that makes the bearer impervious to being located

subject: Phantom Thief origin
fact: Felkur accidentally activated the brooch's magic, leading to him becoming known as the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: which Felkur accidentally activated, leading to him becoming known as the Phantom Thief

subject: Soul Coins
fact: Soul Coins are currency found within the vault representing captured souls used in infernal transactions.
source_quote: Currency found within the vault, representing captured souls used in infernal transactions

subject: Soulcoin Ledger
fact: The Soulcoin Ledger is a record of all soulcoin transactions in Maerimydra found by the party in the vault.
source_quote: A record of all soulcoin transactions in Maerimydra, found by the party in the vault

subject: blackmail material
fact: The Soulcoin Ledger was noted as valuable blackmail material.
source_quote: and noted as valuable blackmail material

subject: Faerzess Shard
fact: Felkur stole a large, pure Faerzess Shard from the vault.
source_quote: A large, pure crystal stolen from the vault by Felkur

subject: Faerzess Shard effect
fact: The Faerzess Shard enhances an artificer's abilities, acting similarly to a wand of the mage with a limited number of charges per day.
source_quote: It enhances an artificer's abilities, acting similarly to a wand of the mage with a limited number of charges per day

subject: Blank Infernal Contracts
fact: Blank Infernal Contracts found in the vault could be used to bind devils.
source_quote: Blank contracts found in the vault that could be used to bind devils

subject: contract removal
fact: Blank Infernal Contracts were taken by a party member.
source_quote: taken by a party member

subject: Arcane Crystals
fact: Arcane Crystals are blue, white, and green crystals collected earlier.
source_quote: Blue, white, and green crystals collected earlier

subject: crystal usage
fact: Felkur used the Arcane Crystals to recalibrate the teleportation circle.
source_quote: and used by Felkur to recalibrate the teleportation circle

subject: crystal buffer
fact: The Arcane Crystals provided additional time in case concentration was lost.
source_quote: providing additional time in case concentration was lost

subject: Magical Mandolin
fact: Daein used a Magical Mandolin to cast Invisibility on Felkur.
source_quote: An instrument used by Daein to cast Invisibility on Felkur

subject: mandolin concealment
fact: The Magical Mandolin concealed Felkur from Veris and the stone golem during the portal room battle.
source_quote: concealing him from Veris and the stone golem during the portal room battle

subject: Eldritch Cannon
fact: Felkur deployed an Eldritch Cannon that fires blasts of energy at enemies.
source_quote: A magical device deployed by Felkur that fires blasts of energy at enemies

subject: cannon deployment timing
fact: Felkur deployed the Eldritch Cannon while he maintained concentration on the portal recalibration.
source_quote: while he maintains concentration on the portal recalibration

subject: True Seeing
fact: Bramgrim cast True Seeing to reveal the hidden magical glyphs on the floor tiles in the corridor.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to reveal the hidden magical glyphs on the floor tiles in the corridor

subject: glyph navigation
fact: True Seeing allowed the party to identify the pattern of the traps and navigate safely.
source_quote: allowing the party to identify the pattern of the traps and navigate safely

subject: vault trap check
fact: True Seeing was used to confirm the vault chamber was free of traps.
source_quote: Also used to confirm the vault chamber was free of traps

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: Glyphs of Warding are magical traps placed on the prime-numbered floor tiles of the corridor leading to the vault.
source_quote: Magical traps placed on the prime-numbered floor tiles of the corridor leading to the vault

subject: glyph explosion trigger
fact: The Glyphs of Warding are designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals.
source_quote: designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals

subject: Sanctuary
fact: Bramgrim cast Sanctuary on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting him with direct melee attacks.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting him with direct melee attacks

subject: Sanctuary duration
fact: Sanctuary protected Felkur while he concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle.
source_quote: while he concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle

subject: Invisibility
fact: Daein cast Invisibility via a magical mandolin to hide Felkur from Veris and the stone golem.
source_quote: Cast by Daein via a magical mandolin to hide Felkur from Veris and the stone golem

subject: Invisibility utility
fact: Invisibility allowed Felkur to work on the portal from behind a pillar without being directly targeted.
source_quote: allowing him to work on the portal from behind a pillar without being directly targeted

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned Spirit Guardians at fifth level to create a protective area of spectral spirits.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim at fifth level to create a protective area of spectral spirits

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas used Hunter's Mark to magically mark the stone golem as her quarry.
source_quote: Used by Akritas to magically mark the stone golem as her quarry

subject: Hunter's Mark damage
fact: Hunter's Mark deals additional damage with Akritas's attacks against the stone golem.
source_quote: dealing additional damage with her attacks against it

subject: Teleport
fact: Veris employed Teleport to instantly reposition himself within the portal chamber during combat.
source_quote: Employed by Veris to instantly reposition himself within the portal chamber during combat

subject: Teleport tactical advantage
fact: Teleport gave Veris a tactical advantage against the party.
source_quote: gaining a tactical advantage against the party

subject: stone golem
fact: A stone golem is a massive, magically immune guardian stationed before the vault door.
source_quote: A massive, magically immune guardian stationed before the vault door

subject: golem access rule
fact: The vault's stone golem is programmed to only allow passage to those carrying Vraxen's scent.
source_quote: programmed to only allow passage to those carrying Vraxen's scent

subject: second stone golem
fact: A second stone golem accompanied Veris to the portal chamber.
source_quote: A second stone golem accompanied Veris to the portal chamber

subject: second golem breach
fact: The second stone golem smashed through the door to the portal chamber.
source_quote: smashing through the door

subject: second golem combat
fact: The second stone golem engaged the party in combat.
source_quote: and engaging the party in combat

subject: portal recalibration
fact: The portal recalibration is ongoing with 6 rounds remaining before collapse.
source_quote: with 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses

subject: Veris pursuit
fact: Veris is pursuing the party to the top of the spire, furious over the forgery.
source_quote: He pursues the party to the top of the spire, furious over the forgery

subject: combat outcome
fact: The confrontation with Veris and the stone golem is unresolved as the session ended mid-combat.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4
